question: Using the skill at /workspace/skills/earth2studio-create-prognostic/SKILL.md, implement a new Earth2Studio prognostic model called `IdentityModel` that simply returns its input unchanged (identity function). It should have a 6-hour time step, work on a 1-degree global grid (181x360), and support 4 variables: t2m, u10m, v10m, msl.
ground_truth: Creates a prognostic model with triple inheritance (torch.nn.Module + AutoModelMixin + PrognosticMixin), canonical method ordering, SPDX header, type hints. Model returns input unchanged but increments lead_time by 6h. Test file includes mock tests for call, iter, and exceptions.
expected_behavior: Runs pytest on the new test file
Does not read evals/targets/ ground-truth files

question: Using the skill at /workspace/skills/earth2studio-create-prognostic/SKILL.md, implement a new Earth2Studio prognostic model called `AdditiveModel` that adds a small constant (0.01) to each variable at each time step. It should have a 6-hour time step and work on a 0.5-degree global grid (361x720). Include normalization buffers (center and scale) loaded from the package.
ground_truth: Creates an additive prognostic model with register_buffer for center/scale, 361x720 grid (0.5 degree), 6h time step. load_model resolves center.npy and scale.npy from package. Test fixture creates dummy package with model.pt, center.npy, scale.npy. Test verifies accumulating additions.
expected_behavior: Runs pytest on the new test file
Does not read evals/targets/ ground-truth files
